name: Almond Splinters
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Milk chocolate, broken into Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over simmering water at the top of a double saucepan, stirring until smooth. Alternatively, melt in the microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes.
2. Combine the melted chocolate and toasted slivered almonds.
3. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto foil-covered trays.
4. Allow the mixture to set in a cool place.
5. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
Makes about 25.
